shorts.description: ARCHBALD, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — There was a packed room in Archbald on Monday night, and a lot of unanswered questions about a data center that could be coming to Lackawanna County. shorts.title: Hobbit-themed Airbnb opens in NEPA
shorts.description: PENN FOREST TOWNSHIP, CARBON COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A Hobbit-themed cabin in Carbon County is drawing big attention from fans of The Lord of the Rings. The one-bedroom, one-bath retreat near Jim Thorpe features a rustic stone and log design inspired by a Hobbit Hole. It's complete with cozy interiors and film references throughout the structure. [...]
